name: Mangomint Salon & Spa Management API
what_it_does: Modern cloud-based salon and spa management platform with API — enabling upscale hair salons, spas, and wellness businesses to manage appointments, client records, staff scheduling, POS, payment processing, and marketing automation with an emphasis on user experience and automation for premium service businesses.
use_cases: Integrating Mangomint appointment data via API for CRM and multi-location management
Automating client communications via Mangomint API for marketing and retention workflows
Syncing staff schedules via Mangomint API for workforce management systems
Managing client history and preferences via Mangomint API for personalization engines
Building partner integrations via Mangomint API for beauty tech ecosystem connections
not_for: Budget-focused small businesses (Mangomint targets upscale/premium salons and spas)
best_when: A premium salon, spa, or wellness business needs modern, intuitive management software with API access for custom integrations — particularly businesses frustrated by legacy tools like Mindbody.
avoid_when: You need a budget solution, healthcare features, or are a solo practitioner without upscale positioning.

auth.notes: API key authentication. Bearer token in Authorization header. API key from Mangomint account settings. Webhooks for appointment, client, and payment events. Webhook signature validation. API access available on paid plans. Limited public API documentation — primarily for integration partners.

pricing.paid_tiers: Essential $165/month; Standard $245/month; Unlimited $375/month (all with API access)
pricing.notes: US company (San Francisco). Founded 2019. Modern Mindbody alternative targeting premium segment. Used by high-end hair salons and day spas. Premium UX: designed for upscale businesses. Automation-focused: AI-powered smart scheduling. Automated marketing (birthday messages, retention campaigns). Express booking: self-service booking optimization. Team commission tracking. PaymentsMangomint integrated payment processing. Concierge customer success. Growing quickly in premium salon segment. API documentation limited — primarily for approved integration partners.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Bearer token. Webhooks with signatures. US company. No free tier. Premium pricing ($165-375/month). API docs limited. Requires paid plan for API. Founded 2019 — growing quickly.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Appointment reads idempotent by ID. Webhook events: implement idempotent handlers. Limited documentation makes full assessment difficult.
known_agent_gotchas: No free tier — minimum $165/month subscription required for API access
API documentation limited — contact support for partner integration documentation
Premium segment focus: targeted at upscale salons ($500K+ annual revenue typical)
Webhook signature validation required — verify payload authenticity
Founded 2019: growing quickly but smaller than established competitors (less community resources)

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. Bearer token auth. Webhook signature validation. US company. PCI-DSS for payment processing. Client PII and payment data in salon records. US data residency. No OAuth2. Credit card required at signup — payment data risk. Growing company — security practices maturing.
